summary: Completed testing of Razorpay subscription feature. All 13 backend API tests passed, frontend UI verified (pricing section on homepage, admin subscription management).

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created test subscriptions (pending status) for order creation tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Razorpay subscription feature fully implemented and tested. Public plans endpoint, order creation, payment verification, access check, and admin management all working.

public_endpoints.GET /api/subscriptions/plans: Working - returns all plan pricing for single_parent and two_parents with 4 durations each
public_endpoints.POST /api/subscriptions/create-order: Working - creates Razorpay order, validates inputs (plan_type, duration, children 1-5)
public_endpoints.POST /api/subscriptions/verify-payment: Working - verifies signature, returns 400 for invalid signature
public_endpoints.GET /api/subscriptions/check-access/{ema: Working - returns has_access=true/false based on subscription status

admin_endpoints.GET /api/subscriptions/admin/list: Working - returns all subscriptions (admin auth required)
admin_endpoints.GET /api/subscriptions/admin/plan-config: Working - returns pricing config for all plans
admin_endpoints.POST /api/subscriptions/admin/plan-confi: Working - updates pricing for specific plan/duration

frontend_pages.Homepage PricingSection: Working - Plan type toggle (Single/Two Parents), Children selector (1-5), Duration cards (1 Day/1 Month/6 Months/1 Year), Buy Now button opens checkout dialog
frontend_pages.Checkout Dialog: Working - Full Name, Email, Phone inputs, Pay button with correct amount
frontend_pages.Admin Dashboard: Working - Subscriptions card visible with 'Plans & Payments' description, links to /admin/subscriptions
frontend_pages.Admin Subscription Management: Working - Stats cards (Total/Active/Expired/Revenue), Subscriptions tab (list with search), Plan Pricing tab (config forms for all durations)

razorpay_integration.status: Working - Real Razorpay test orders created successfully
